examples: Children who are far off; Amitabha.
Amitabha is the most ancient Buddha among the Dhyani buddhas.
As soon as you chop of my head, I can go to the Pure Land of Amitabha.
"A delegation from Germany's top five universities has been pleading with us to send our students there, " says Amitabha Ghosh, the director of IIT Kharagpur.
